title: Codes used in Operational interval extraction based on long-short term memory networks for building more feasible reservoir operation models
author: Zheng, Yalian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Codes used in Operational interval extraction based on long-short term memory networks for building more feasible reservoir operation models. 
  Physics-guided LSTM-based interval extraction model.py  is used to extract the operational interval,Constraint.m  main_DPSA.m, Calculate_dis.m, DPSA_DDDP_UTF8.m and Constraint.m are the reservoir optimization operation models.
steps_raw:
